recommendations.title: Ernest Goes to Jail
recommendations.overview: Bumbling bank janitor Ernest P. Worrell is assigned to jury duty, and soon finds himself in trouble when he is covertly switched with a look-a-like crime boss. Ernest must escape from jail to expose the mix-up.

recommendations.title: Ernest Goes to Camp
recommendations.overview: Ernest, a lovable loser who works as a summer camp handyman and dreams of becoming a guidance counselor, must find a way to inspire a group of juvenile delinquents while stopping a shady strip mining company from closing the camp as well.

recommendations.title: Ernest Saves Christmas
recommendations.overview: When Santa Claus decides to retire and pass on his magic bag of Christmas surprises to a new Saint Nick, he enlists the aid of a hilarious assortment of characters. A perky teen runaway and hapless taxi driver Ernest P. Worrell must convince a skepti

recommendations.title: Ernest & Celestine
recommendations.overview: Celestine is a little mouse trying to avoid a dental career while Ernest is a big bear craving an artistic outlet. When Celestine meets Ernest, they overcome their natural enmity by forging a life of crime together.
recommendations.director: Vincent Patar, Benjamin Renner, Stéphane Aubier

recommendations.title: Demon Slayer -Kimetsu no Yaiba- The Movie: Mugen Train
recommendations.overview: Tanjiro Kamado, joined with Inosuke Hashibira, a boy raised by boars who wears a boar's head, and Zenitsu Agatsuma, a scared boy who reveals his true power when he sleeps, boards the Infinity Train on a new mission with the Fire Hashira, Kyojuro Reng

recommendations.title: Death Becomes Her
recommendations.overview: Madeline is married to Ernest, who was once her arch-rival Helen's fiancé. After recovering from a mental breakdown, Helen vows to kill Madeline and steal back Ernest. Unfortunately for everyone, the introduction of a magic potion causes things to be

recommendations.title: We Have a Ghost
recommendations.overview: After Kevin finds a ghost named Ernest haunting his new home, he becomes an overnight social media sensation. But when Kevin and Ernest go rogue to investigate the mystery of the latter's past, they become targets of the CIA.

recommendations.title: Bad Milo!
recommendations.overview: A horror comedy centered on a guy who learns that his unusual stomach problems are being caused by a demon living in his intestines.

recommendations.title: The Importance of Being Earnest
recommendations.overview: Two young gentlemen living in 1890s England use the same pseudonym ('Ernest') on the sly, which is fine until they both fall in love with women using that name, which leads to a comedy of mistaken identities.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Mark
recommendations.overview: An exorcist priest meets a family that has a daughter who is pursued by a demon.
